grades.expectation: Response cites specific Handbook Part 1 section numbers (5.14 for leasehold, 5.5 for building regs)
grades.reason: Correctly cites HB 5.14.1 for lease term and HB 5.5.1-5.5.2 for building regulations

grades.expectation: Response mentions Part 2 lender-specific requirements for lease length
grades.reason: Explicitly states 'Check Part 2 for your lender's minimum term requirement' and mentions checking Part 2 for indemnity insurance acceptance

grades.expectation: Response discusses building regulations enforcement period (4-year/10-year thresholds)
grades.reason: Mentions '4 years for injunction proceedings' and '12 months for prosecution after discovery' - covers relevant enforcement periods

grades.expectation: Response mentions indemnity insurance as potential resolution for building regs
grades.reason: Specifically discusses 'Building regulations indemnity policy' and references HB 9 requirements for lender protection

grades.expectation: Response does NOT just give generic advice — provides handbook-specific guidance
grades.reason: Uses Handbook decision tree analysis, cites specific sections, references reporting requirements per HB 2.3, and provides structured handbook-based approach
